articles.title: America 250 kicks off in nation's capital as Americans brave weather to celebrate Independence Day - Fox News
articles.description: Americans are celebrating the 250th anniversary of their independence across the country on Saturday. President Donald Trump will address the crowd Saturday night after severe weather suspended some events in Washington, D.C., earlier in the evening.
articles.content: Patriotic spectators were evacuated from the grounds of the Great American State Fair and Salute to America after storms rolled in to Washington, D.C., prompting a postponement of U.S. military flyov… [+1799 chars]
